title: Monthly Canada411 Scraper
skills: DATA PROCESSING | Data Processing | Selenium | Scrapy | Automation | Python | Web Scraping | Software Architecture | Data Mining
full_description:
Each month I need fresh consumer-listing data pulled from both [login to view URL] and YellowPages.ca. The focus is on contact information only, specifically the name, full mailing address, and phone number that appear on each record.

Here’s how I picture the workflow:

• You run an automated scrape on the two sites, bypassing basic anti-bot measures without overloading their servers. 
• You clean and deduplicate the results so every row represents a unique listing. 
• You deliver a single, well-structured CSV file (UTF-8) containing three columns: Name, Address, Phone.

I’m open to the toolset you prefer—Python, Scrapy, Selenium, or an equivalent stack—as long as the output remains consistent month after month. If you have an existing script that can be adapted, great; otherwise please factor initial script creation and monthly execution into your offer.

Reliability is key: the scrape should grab everything visible on the target pages, capture any new records that appear since the last run, and flag any format changes that might break the script. A quick sample file or proof-of-concept run will help confirm we’re aligned before the first full delivery.

Let me know your proposed approach, estimated turnaround for the first dataset, and any clarifications you need.

full_description:

Scope of work 
1. Re-skin: change the app name, package name and splash/logo. I’ll supply the primary logo and colour palette; a few supplemental assets (notification icon, feature graphic) still need creating to match the new look. 
2. Admin panel: install and configure the PHP/Laravel back-end on my server so every function in the demo works under the new domain. 
3. Core integrations (the critical bit): connect my Firebase project for authentication, real-time database and push, then wire in [login to view URL] for 10-seat voice chat rooms with token security enabled. Previous hands-on experience with Agora is essential. 
4. Monetisation: integrate Paytm as the in-app coin recharge gateway, including callback verification and testing in both sandbox and production. (If Razorpay is easier to slot in alongside Paytm, that flexibility is welcome, but Paytm must be live.) 
5. Release build & publishing: generate the signed AAB, set up the Play Console listing, pass all pre-launch checks and hand over the keystore and full source.

Acceptance criteria 
• All original app features run flawlessly under the new branding. 
• Voice rooms connect without echo or disconnect issues on 4G/Wi-Fi. 
• Paytm payment returns verified coins instantly to the user wallet. 
• No fatal errors or policy warnings during Google Play review.

If you’ve already reskinned CodeCanyon scripts or shipped Agora-based voice apps, this should be straightforward. Please share one live example with your bid and include an estimated turnaround time for each stage.

• Workflow: Short, well-defined sprints with code reviews, unit/prop tests, and threat-model discussions baked in. We rely on Git, CI/CD, and reproducible build pipelines.

• Collaboration style: I value contributors who don’t just code to spec but question assumptions and propose stronger designs when they spot an attack surface or efficiency gain.

When you reach out, focus on your relevant experience—examples of prior cryptography projects, contributions to open-source security libraries, or audits you’ve handled. If NDAs restrict you, outline the nature of the work and the results you achieved rather than revealing sensitive details.

If low-level bit-twiddling, side-channel resistance, and protocol hardening get you fired up, let’s talk.

full_description:
We are seeking an experienced QuickBooks Online specialist to assist with an urgent accounting data migration and reconstruction project.
Scope of Work
• Our company migrated from QuickBooks Desktop to QuickBooks Online in November 2025.
• Business activity from December 2025 through the present was entered into an original QuickBooks Online file.
• Due to an internal issue, we now need to rebuild a new QuickBooks Online company file.
• The successful freelancer will re-enter and verify all transactions from December 2025 to the present into the new QuickBooks Online file.
• Ensure records are accurate, balanced, and complete.
Responsibilities
• Recreate bookkeeping records in QuickBooks Online.
• Enter and categorize transactions accurately.
• Reconcile bank and credit card accounts.
• Verify account balances and resolve discrepancies.
• Review financial data for completeness and consistency.
• Assist in ensuring the new QuickBooks Online file matches the historical records.
Required Experience
• Strong, hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online.
• Experience with QuickBooks Desktop migrations and data reconstruction.
• Proven bookkeeping and reconciliation skills.
• High attention to detail and ability to work independently.
• Ability to meet tight deadlines and communicate progress clearly.
Preferred Qualifications
• Accounting or bookkeeping background.
• Experience troubleshooting migration issues or rebuilding accounting records.
• Familiarity with month-end reconciliations and financial reporting.
Project Details
• Priority: High – immediate start required.
• Time Period Covered: December 2025 through the present.
• Project Goal: Deliver a fully reconciled and accurate QuickBooks Online file ready for ongoing business use.
When applying, please include:
• A brief summary of your QuickBooks experience.
• Examples of similar migration or cleanup projects you’ve completed.
• Your availability to start immediately.
• Your hourly rate or fixed-price estimate.
This is an urgent engagement, and preference will be given to candidates who can begin work right away and demonstrate expertise in QuickBooks migrations, reconciliations, and complex bookkeeping cleanup.

full_description:
Project Title: The Gentle Return: 30 Days of Grounded Living

I’m looking for a designer to create a beautiful, cohesive digital workbook/PDF for a product called The Gentle Return: 30 Days of Grounded Living.

This is a 30-day grounding challenge designed primarily for women and mothers who long to slow down, reconnect with themselves, and cultivate a more intentional life.

The tone of this resource is gentle, comforting, hopeful, and quietly whimsical. It should feel less like a traditional self-help workbook and more like a trusted companion guiding someone back to themselves.

Aesthetic & Design Direction:

* Soft, feminine, and timeless
* Whimsical without feeling childish
* Elegant without feeling overly formal
* Light and airy with plenty of white space
* Natural and calming

Visual inspiration:

* English cottage gardens
* Delicate butterflies
* Soft watercolor florals
* Wildflowers and subtle botanical details
* Vintage storybook illustrations
* The feeling of a quiet morning with a cup of tea

Please avoid:

* Anything that feels obviously AI-generated
* Bright or overly saturated colors
* Heavy spirituality imagery (crystals, chakras, moons, etc.)
* Busy layouts or cluttered pages
* Harsh fonts or modern minimalist corporate aesthetics

Preferred color palette:

* Warm cream/ivory
* Sage green
* Dusty blue
* Soft blush
* Muted lavender

Typography:

* Elegant serif fonts for headings
* Readable, classic fonts for body text
* Soft and timeless rather than trendy

The workbook will include:

* Cover page
* Welcome page
* Four themed weeks (30 daily challenge pages total)
* One closing page

Each daily page should follow the same layout:

* Day number/title
* Today’s Practice
* Reflection
* Gentle Reminder

The final product should be delivered as:

* An editable Canva template
* A print-quality PDF
* A mobile-friendly PDF that is easy to read from a phone

The overall feeling I want readers to have is this:

“I can finally exhale.”

I want this workbook to feel like a gentle invitation to slow down, notice the beauty around them, and remember that they can always find their way back to themselves.

title: Kubernetes AI CICD Demo Application
skills: KUBERNETES | Kubernetes | MLOps | Terraform | LangChain | CI/CD | Docker | CUDA | Containerization | Open Source | AI Development
full_description:
I want a working proof-of-concept application that pulls together a modern MLOps stack on Kubernetes. The build should spin up from a clean repo, flow through a CI/CD pipeline, and deploy an end-to-end demo that highlights three AI pillars I care about: Nvidia AI Enterprise for accelerated inference and training, production-grade LLM functionality (LangChain-powered), and Retrieval-Augmented Generation using a vector store.

Core workflow 
• Code is pushed → pipeline (GitHub Actions or similar) runs tests, builds the container image, and promotes it to the cluster. 
• Helm or ArgoCD handles drift management so that the desired state remains in sync. 
• At runtime, the service must auto-scale both CPU and GPU requests, proving horizontal and vertical elasticity. 
• Token or currency budgeting is tracked per request so I can see live cost data and later hook it into FinOps dashboards.

Inside the cluster 
• Nvidia AI Enterprise stack (Triton, TensorRT, CUDA) installed via the operator. 
• LLM endpoints wrapped with LangChain agents that can call external tools. 
• A vector database (FAISS, Milvus, or anything OSS) stores embeddings for RAG. 
• One sample agent demonstrates question-answering over the vector store; another shows a multi-tool plan/act loop.

What I need from you 
1. Terraform or similar IaC scripts for the base GKE/EKS/AKS cluster. 
2. CI/CD definitions, Kubernetes manifests/Helm charts, and any ArgoCD configuration. 
3. Demo notebooks or curl scripts that hit the endpoints and display: model output, RAG enrichment, token usage, and cost. 


Acceptance criteria 
• End-to-end pipeline green on a fresh account. 
• Pod autoscaling proves GPU/CPU resizing under load. 
• LLM call enriched by RAG returns expected citations. 
• FinOps metrics exported (Prometheus/OpenCost acceptable). 

Keep everything as open source as possible; licence notes if you must use a proprietary component. I’m happy to iterate quickly, so push early versions and we’ll harden them together.

title: Implementation ERPNext
skills: PHP | PHP | Python | Software Architecture | ERP | Web Hosting | Server
full_description:
# ERPNext Implementation Project – Fixed Scope – Experienced ERPNext Specialists Only

## Deadline

Target go-live for the core ERP system within 3 weeks from project start.
This is a completely new ERP installation. No existing ERPNext system is currently in use.

# Important Notice Before Applying

We are a medical device company based in Germany.
We understand ERPNext very well and are familiar with the distinction between:

• native ERPNext functionality
• configuration and setup
• moderate customization
• custom development
We are specifically looking for experienced ERPNext implementation specialists.

We are not looking for:

• ERP consulting projects
• BPMN workshops
• discovery phases
• UI design projects
• sprint-based development contracts
• inflated workload estimates

Please clearly identify which requirements are:

1. Native ERPNext functionality
2. Configuration / setup
3. Minor customization
4. Custom development

Any proposal that treats standard ERPNext functionality as major custom development will be viewed critically.

# Project Objective

The objective is to implement a practical, efficient and easy-to-use ERP system for daily operations.
The focus is on:
• customer management
• quotations
• sales orders
• delivery notes
• invoicing
• inventory management
• accounting support
• customer communication
• management reporting

The system must be optimized for non-technical office staff.

# Core ERP Modules

The following modules shall be installed and configured:
• Accounting
• Sales
• Purchase
• Inventory / Stock
• CRM
• Project Management
• Helpdesk / Customer Support
• Quality Management
• Email Integration
• Reports & Dashboards
• User & Permission Management

Not required:
• HR
• Agriculture
• Construction
• Non-Profit

Manufacturing only if clearly required by ERPNext setup.

# User Interface Requirements
The system will be used primarily by non-technical office employees.
The implementation shall focus on simplicity and efficiency.

Required:

• Role-based workspaces
• Dashboard-style navigation
• Direct shortcuts for daily tasks
• Minimal-click workflows
• Quick access to:

* quotations
* sales orders
* delivery notes
* invoices
* customer records
 • Simplified forms where appropriate
 • Context-sensitive action buttons

The objective is to avoid excessive menu navigation.
Users should be able to perform daily tasks in as few clicks as possible.

# Customer Management & CRM

Required:
• Customer database
• Contact management
• Lead management
• Opportunity tracking
• Follow-up reminders
• Task assignment
• Meeting and activity tracking
• Complete customer history

Authorized sales employees shall be able to access:

• emails
• notes
• quotations
• sales orders
• invoices
• activities
• tasks

without requiring access to another employee's mailbox.

# Email Integration
Required:

• Microsoft 365 / Outlook integration preferred
• Central visibility of customer communication
• Email templates
• Email logging
• Customer communication history

The goal is that customer-related communication becomes company knowledge rather than remaining in individual mailboxes.

# Customer Ordering Portal (B2B)
This is not a public webshop.

Required:
• Secure customer login
• Order history
• Invoice downloads
• Delivery document downloads
• Repeat-order functionality
• Customer-specific pricing
• Order tracking
• Search and filtering

Payment Integration:
• Stripe, PayPal, Mollie or equivalent
• Payment status linked to ERP transactions

# Global Business Search

A powerful search function is required.
Users shall be able to search by:

• customer name
• contact person
• city
• manufacturer
• product
• device model
• LOT number
• serial number
• invoice number
• delivery note number
• sales order number
• invoice amount
• custom fields

Example:

Searching for "manufactuerer name" should return:

• products
• devices
• customers
• sales transactions
• invoices
• related documents

The objective is to find information without knowing the ERP module where it is stored.

# Inventory Management

Required:
• Real-time inventory visibility
• Warehouse overview
• LOT / Batch tracking
• Serial number tracking
• Stock movement history
• Inventory valuation
• Low-stock alerts
• Reorder notifications

Inventory shall be searchable by:
• product
• manufacturer
• LOT
• serial number
• warehouse

# Accounting & Finance

Required:
• Sales invoices
• Supplier invoices
• Payment tracking
• Open receivables
• Open payables
• Automated dunning
• Payment reminders
• Customer account statements

Bank Integration:

• Automated bank statement import
• Transaction reconciliation
• Matching payments to invoices
• Matching payments to supplier invoices

German E-Invoicing:

• XRechnung
• ZUGFeRD 2.1.1 or higher

DATEV export capability is preferred.

# Reporting & Business Intelligence

Required dashboards:

Customer Analytics

• Top customers by revenue
• Revenue trends
• Customer growth
• Customer purchase history

Product Analytics

• Best-selling products
• Revenue by product
• Revenue by manufacturer
• Product performance

Financial Analytics

• Open receivables
• Overdue invoices
• Cash flow indicators

Inventory Analytics

• Inventory value
• Fast-moving products
• Slow-moving products
• Critical stock levels

# Newsletter & Marketing
Required:
• Mailing lists
• Newsletter campaigns
• Reusable templates
• GDPR-compliant unsubscribe functionality
• Newsletter history
• Sent campaigns overview

Native ERPNext functionality is preferred.

# Document Management
Required:

• Attachment management
• Central document storage
• Customer-related documents
• Supplier-related documents
• Searchable document archive

# Security

Required:

• HTTPS / SSL
• Role-based permissions
• Optional 2FA
• Daily backups
• Full administrator access

# Documentation & Training

Required:
• Technical documentation
• Backup documentation
• Documentation of all customizations
• Administrator training
• End-user training

# Future AI Capabilities (Optional)

The proposal may optionally describe future integration possibilities for AI-assisted workflows, including:

• Email draft generation
• Quotation draft generation
• CRM summaries
• Newsletter draft generation

All AI-generated content must require manual review and approval before being sent.

# Proposal Requirements
Please provide:

• ERPNext project references
• Fixed-price proposal
• Timeline
• Breakdown of:

* Native ERPNext
* Configuration
* Minor customization
* Custom development
 • Confirmation of fixed-scope delivery

We are specifically interested in practical ERPNext implementation experience and realistic project estimation.

Development and Hosting Environment

The final production system will be hosted either on our own server infrastructure or on a hosting environment specified by us.
For development purposes, the contractor may use:
• their own development server
• their own hosting environment
• their own cloud environment

Alternatively, development may also take place on infrastructure provided by us.
The choice of development environment is not a selection criterion.
The completed system must be transferable to the final production environment without functional limitations.
The proposal should focus on implementation quality and functionality rather than hosting assumptions.

full_description:
Looking for a skilled freelancer to design and develop a comprehensive panel for managing International Premium Rate Numbers (IPRN) services. The panel should include the following features: 
- Carrier management: Add carrier details, IPs/Ports, and personal notes. 
- Number management: Bulk upload numbers via CSV, allocate numbers to clients, edit pricing, and manage unallocated numbers with IVR playback. 
- Advanced search and reporting: Search by client, carrier, range, country, rate, etc., with CSV export options. 
- Client management: Add client details (name, email, phone), allocate numbers to clients, and generate invoices. 
- Statistics: CDRs, live calls, reports on calls/minutes/payouts per carrier or client with CSV export options. 
- Secure platform with high capacity and quick installation script (.sh) including Asterisk/FS setup. 

Skills Required: PHP, Software Architecture, Asterisk PBX, MySQL, JavaScript

title: Skincare Product Formulation & Development
skills: PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT | Product Development | Market Research
full_description:
I’m creating a new skincare line and need an experienced cosmetic chemist to turn my concept into a safe, stable, and market-ready formula. The core focus is product development: selecting effective active ingredients, determining optimal percentages, and ensuring the formulation meets global cosmetic regulations (EU, FDA, and any relevant regional standards). 

The project covers: 
• In-depth ingredient research aligned with my brand’s clean-beauty positioning 
• Lab-ready formula with detailed percentages, pH, viscosity, and preservative system 
• Stability and compatibility guidance so samples survive shelf-life testing 
• Regulatory and INCI documentation, plus suggested claims that remain compliant 
• Scalable instructions for pilot-to-full production, including equipment specs 
• Packaging compatibility advice to prevent formula interactions 

For acceptance, I’ll review the completed formulation sheet, regulatory dossier, and a brief report on recommended efficacy tests. Once approved, we can discuss optional next steps such as pilot batching or further line extensions.

title: Copilot Automation Setup & Training -- 2

full_description:
I already hold a Microsoft 365 Copilot licence but, right now, I’m only scratching the surface of what it can do. I want to turn my office laptop into a truly automated workspace by weaving Copilot deeply into the Microsoft Office Suite I use every day—chiefly Outlook and Excel. 

Here’s what I need from you: configure Copilot end-to-end so that routine email handling, data analysis and other repetitive tasks run automatically and reliably. In Outlook that means intelligent triage, drafting and follow-ups; in Excel, on-the-fly data clean-ups, summaries and insights generated with a single prompt. I also want to link these pieces together so common tasks (for example, pulling numbers from a weekly report and sending a pre-formatted update) happen without manual effort. 

Your first step will be a quick audit of my current environment. From there you’ll design the workflows, implement them directly on my laptop, and walk me through how to tweak or extend them later. Clear documentation and a short live hand-over session are essential. 

Deliverables 
• Fully functioning Copilot automations for: 
 – Email management in Outlook 
 – Data analysis routines in Excel 
 – Cross-app task automation that ties both together 
• Step-by-step usage guide and annotated screenshots 
• One live knowledge-transfer call to ensure I can maintain and expand the workflows on my own 

Acceptance criteria: every workflow must run locally on my office machine without breaking corporate policies, execute in under a minute for typical workloads and be easy for me to adjust through Copilot prompts. 

If you have deep Microsoft 365 experience and a knack for turning Copilot into a practical productivity engine, let’s get started.
